scenarios.description: children() with only text nodes caches empty result on first call and reuses underlying list referent on second call (referent non-null path)
scenarios.precondition: Element has one TextNode child and no Element children
scenarios.expectedResult: first and second children() calls return equal sizes=0 but wrap referent cache path, second call uses non-null referent
pseudocode: TEST TC08 children text-only cache reuse
// underlying referent list reused, verify no NullPointer or recompute

scenarios.description: children() recomputes after children cleared via empty(), invalidating cache and returning empty list
scenarios.precondition: Element has two Element children and cache primed
pseudocode: TEST TC09 children recompute after empty
el.empty(); // clears childNodes and triggers nodelistChanged
